role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues consistent with the image.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (scrub, grasses) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road construction, curbs, and utility poles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (hydrant style, pole design) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Chile. The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding infrastructure and vegetation. The meta agent played a crucial role in distinguishing Chile from Argentina using specific visual cues (hydrant/pole design).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of scrub, concrete slabs, and overcast sky match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of hardy grasses and scrub match the roadside vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete curbs, poles, and hydrant match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of brick walls, corrugated metal, and pole shapes match the image.
